author: DominicVainMod
content:
@here

Introducing our new Discord category: Events! 

At Star Atlas, there's always events going on. This new category serves as a way to more easily discuss and stay up-to-date on events going on in our community.

If you'd like to be notified of news regarding events, please head to ⁠🔔┃choose-pings to gain a role that will be pinged with important information.

The first event we've added is a meetup created by the community! This meetup will be at Solana Breakpoint on November 6th. For more information head to ⁠No Access.
